title: JobStatus
description: DynamoDB job status record for a Lintellect review job. Tracks the lifecycle of a review from webhook receipt to comment posting. Written by the Step Functions state machine at each state transition. Queried by job ID, PR URL, or repository name.

jobId.description: Unique identifier for this review job. UUID v4 format. Serves as the DynamoDB partition key.

status.description: Current status of the review job. Updated at each pipeline stage transition. Terminal states are COMPLETED, FAILED, and SKIPPED.

prUrl.description: Full URL of the pull request on GitHub. Used as a GSI partition key for looking up all jobs associated with a specific PR.

repoFullName.description: Full repository name in owner/name format. Used as a GSI partition key for looking up all jobs for a repository.

prNumber.description: Pull request number within the repository.

headSha.description: Full SHA of the head (source) commit at the time the review was triggered.

baseSha.description: Full SHA of the base (target) commit at the time the review was triggered.

author.description: GitHub login of the PR author.

createdAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when this job record was created (job enqueued).

updatedAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of the most recent status update.

errorMessage.description: Human-readable error description when status is FAILED. Includes enough detail to diagnose the root cause without accessing CloudWatch logs.
examples: LLM provider returned CONTEXT_LENGTH_EXCEEDED: input tokens (210,000) exceed model maximum (200,000).

failedStep.description: Name of the pipeline step where the failure occurred. Corresponds to a Step Functions state name. Only present when status is FAILED.

reviewUrl.description: URL of the posted GitHub PR review. Only present when status is COMPLETED and the review was successfully posted.

evidenceMetrics.description: Metrics from the Evidence Gate validation step. Only present after the EVIDENCE_GATE step completes.

totalComments.description: Total number of comments produced by all four review passes before evidence validation.

acceptedCount.description: Number of comments that passed evidence validation and will be posted.

rejectedCount.description: Number of comments rejected by the Evidence Gate.

passRate.description: Ratio of accepted comments to total comments (acceptedCount / totalComments). Value between 0.0 and 1.0. When totalComments is 0, passRate is 1.0.

s3Prefix.description: S3 key prefix under which all artifacts for this job are stored. Format: packets/{jobId}/

executionArn.description: AWS Step Functions execution ARN for this job. Used for debugging and linking to the Step Functions console.

expiresAt.description: TTL attribute for DynamoDB automatic deletion. Epoch seconds, set to createdAt + 90 days. DynamoDB automatically deletes expired items within approximately 48 hours of the TTL value.
